boat.construction_details: iroko on oak sawn and steamedCopper roves and bronze screws lead keel bronze floors and keel bolts.
boat.full_description: Extensive Inventory much renewed /replaced in current ownership. Sale or shares and or assistance in maintenance. Rewired ship cable, New Mainsail ..spars revarnished ,antifouled . Many sails. Bronze Floors Lead ballast keel replaced  breasthook. regalvanised chainplates new fastenings in bronze.
boat.name: Chloe May
boat.short_description: Percy Dalton designed Gaff Cutter.  Built 1982  Peter Nash ,Dartmouth. Iroko on Oak.  Copper and bronze fastened. Recent reducing and much else besides. James Lawrence Main  Ratsey foresails. Loads of gear   Reputedly Canaries to Antigua 14 days single handed Antigua Week prizewinner.   42 ft LOD
